5. Who discovered oxygen and when?
(Pg. 207, E)

B) T. Engelmann (1770)

D) Joseph Priestly (1774)

the plant?
(Pg. 207, E)
A) T. Engelmann B) Joseph Priestly
C) Jan Ingenhousz
D) Cornelius van trial
7. part of the plants that could release
oxygen.
(Pg. 207, E)
A) Jan Ingenhousz
B) T. Engelmann
C) Joseph priestly
D) None of these

demonstrate that photosynthesis is
essentially a light dependent reaction.
